title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries. Police are investigating the 'planned fight' that led to the incident.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14, 2026, at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Showcases Charlotte's role as a hub for advanced manufacturing and technical training in polymer science.

title: Supply Chain Issues Impact Florists Ahead of Mother's Day
summary: Local florists face rising supply chain costs before Mother's Day, potentially impacting prices for consumers.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates how global economic factors affect local businesses and consumer spending during peak seasons.

title: Union County Women Accused of Swindling Elderly Men
summary: Two women in Union County allegedly defrauded an elderly man of approximately $25,000 by posing as friends and family.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about scams targeting vulnerable populations and the importance of financial security.

title: CMS Considers Matching Proposed Teacher Raise
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools (CMS) is evaluating its ability to match a proposed 7% teacher raise, impacting roughly 2,700 locally funded positions.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the ongoing debate about teacher compensation and its effect on the quality of education.

title: NCDOT Addresses Safety Concerns for I-77 Toll Lanes
summary: North Carolina officials detail safety and economic benefits of the proposed I-77 South toll lanes project in Charlotte, amid mixed community reactions.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the complexities of infrastructure development and community engagement in transportation projects.

title: Charlotte Woman Tortured for Months Before Death
summary: A 19-year-old Charlotte woman, Isabella Stroupe, was allegedly tortured for several months before her death. Thomaz Hamilton, 24, is accused of the murder.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a horrific crime, raising concerns about violence against women and the need for justice.

title: Fatal Car Crash in East Charlotte
summary: A man was killed in a car crash on Eastway Drive near North Tryon Street in east Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Reports on traffic fatalities, emphasizing the importance of road safety.

title: Charlotte Nonprofit Manufacturer to Lay Off Over 100
summary: Lions Services, a Charlotte nonprofit providing employment for people with visual impairments, is reportedly laying off over 100 people.
charlotte_impact: Highlights job losses in the nonprofit sector and the impact on vulnerable populations.

title: SC Lawmakers to Unveil 'Logan's Law' After Waxhaw Woman's Murder
summary: Lawmakers will introduce "Logan's Law" to track violent offenders, prompted by the murder of Logan Federico in Waxhaw.
charlotte_impact: Addresses systemic failures in tracking violent offenders and aims to improve public safety through legislative action.

title: Weather Alert: Severe Weather Possible in Charlotte
summary: Pockets of heavy rain and a low-end severe weather risk could impact Charlotte early Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about potential weather hazards and encourages preparedness.

title: Rain and Storms Expected Late Wednesday
summary: Rain and storms are expected late Wednesday, with cooler temperatures arriving on Friday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather forecast for the Charlotte area.

title: Fatal Rollover Crash in Waxhaw
summary: A rollover crash in Waxhaw resulted in one death and another hospitalization. Speed is believed to be a factor.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a fatal traffic accident, reinforcing the dangers of speeding.

title: How a Charlotte TV Station Funded the Launch of CNN
summary: A struggling Charlotte TV station, now WCNC, played a crucial role in funding the launch of CNN by Ted Turner.
charlotte_impact: Recounts a significant moment in media history and Charlotte's connection to the founding of CNN.

title: Missing Hunter Found Safe in Lancaster County
summary: A 70-year-old hunter who went missing in Lancaster County was found safe after a three-day search.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a successful search and rescue operation, bringing relief to the community.
